Earn XYO tokens by Staking tokens
We are opening a staking pool with huge rewards. When your various tokens is staked into the pool,you will get the tokens of corresponding APY income. When you unstake you will receive all the originally deposited Token and any additional from fees.The staking pools award is official provided by XYO.
